description_long: This is a large, industrial-style shelving unit constructed from dark metal with five horizontal shelves. The frame is composed of sturdy, rectangular metal beams with open sides, providing structural support and visibility from all angles. Each shelf is made of slatted metal, allowing for airflow and easy cleaning, and is loaded with a variety of gray and striped rectangular boxes of different sizes. The shelves are evenly spaced, maximizing storage capacity and making it suitable for use in garages, warehouses, or urban storage areas. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, with no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments. The open design allows for easy access to stored items from the front and sides.
description: A large, open metal shelving unit with five slatted shelves, filled with gray and striped boxes. Its industrial design is robust and utilitarian, ideal for urban storage or garage use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full width of the shelving unit, with all five shelves visible and loaded with various boxes.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the shelves and the arrangement of boxes, with the open frame structure clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the shelving unit, showing the boxes from behind and the open, slatted shelf design.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, highlighting the shelf depth and the open, accessible frame.
